name: 沙漠之鹰 | 午夜风暴
nameZh: 沙漠之鹰 | 午夜风暴
descriptionEn: As expensive as it is powerful, the Desert Eagle is an iconic pistol that is difficult to master but surprisingly accurate at long range. It has been painted with a hydrographic of a stormy sea over a blue metallic base coat. I don't hate you Sebastien... I pity you - Chase Turner, Coalition Defector
descriptionZh: 杀伤力和它的卖价一样高，沙漠之鹰是一把很难驾驭，而在远距离又出乎意料精准的经典手枪。 这把武器以蓝色金属为外表，使用惊涛骇浪的花纹进行了自定义涂装。 我不恨你，塞巴斯蒂安… 我只是同情你 - 联合特遣队叛逃者蔡斯.特纳
